note: Baked-in analyst intel from JagSays' 2026 RotoWire projections guide (redraft/dynasty/best-ball). Deltas are curated to reflect the strength of each take. Editable/removable in the Intel Log like any pasted intel.

Mike McDaniel offense — virtually the same measurables and skill set as Garrett Wilson, but with a QB and coach. Draft him instead of Tee Higgins or Kyren Williams.
